mapper.select: SELECT p.pin_id, p.user_email, u.nickname, p.place_name, p.facility_type, p.comment, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.del_yn, p.created_at FROM map_pins p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_email = u.email WHERE p.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO map_pins ( user_email, place_name, facility_type, comment, latitude, longitude, del_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userEmail}, #{placeName}, #{facilityType}, #{comment}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 'N', NOW() )
